acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 language features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if the application relies on JDK 21 specific behaviors.

acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus platform version from 2.13.0.Final to 3.6.0 to support the Java 21 migration.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x does not support Java 21; attempting to run or build with JDK 21 would result in runtime errors or build failures due to unsupported bytecode versions or removed APIs.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Code compiled with Java 17 settings may not utilize Java 21 features or may fail if the project enforces Java 21 language features elsewhere; ensures binary compatibility with JDK 21.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus platform version from 2.13.0.Final to 3.6.0 to support the Java 21 migration and access newer Quarkus features.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x does not support Java 21 as a primary target; upgrading to Quarkus 3.x is required for JDK 21 compatibility.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus devtools version to match the new Quarkus 3.6.0 platform version.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Devtools version must align with the platform version to ensure consistent code generation and tooling support.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus base-codestarts version to match the new Quarkus 3.6.0 platform version.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Codestarts version must align with the platform version to ensure consistent code generation.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy RESTEasy dependencies with RESTEasy Reactive dependencies to align with Quarkus 3 defaults.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3 defaults to RESTEasy Reactive; using legacy RESTEasy may cause conflicts or deprecation warnings, and reactive is required for optimal performance in Quarkus 3.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add RESTEasy Reactive Jackson dependency for JSON serialization support in the new reactive stack.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: The reactive REST stack requires explicit Jackson integration for JSON processing, which was implicit or handled differently in the legacy stack.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy REST Client dependency with REST Client Reactive dependency.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3 defaults to reactive extensions; the legacy REST client is deprecated or incompatible with the new default configuration.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add REST Client Reactive Jackson dependency for JSON serialization support in the new reactive client stack.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: The reactive REST client requires explicit Jackson integration for JSON processing.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove legacy RESTEasy Jackson dependency as it is replaced by the reactive variant.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: The legacy dependency is no longer needed and may conflict with the new reactive stack.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Undertow dependency as Quarkus 3 defaults to a different HTTP server (Netty) or manages it differently.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Undertow is no longer the default or supported HTTP server in Quarkus 3; removing it prevents conflicts.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Kotlin version from 1.7.10 to 1.9.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Quarkus 3.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Kotlin versions may not fully support Java 21 bytecode or features required by the new stack.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus Quinoa extension from 1.2.1 to 2.0.5 to align with Quarkus 3.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Quinoa 1.x is not compatible with Quarkus 3; upgrading is required for the frontend integration to work.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus JGit extension from 2.2.0 to 2.3.1 to align with Quarkus 3 ecosystem.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions may have compatibility issues with Quarkus 3 or its dependencies.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Google Analytics Java library with Segment Analytics Java library.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating its analytics backend from Google Analytics to Segment; the old library is no longer used.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Segment Analytics version property to manage the new dependency version.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Required to define the version for the new Segment Analytics dependency.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Google Analytics Java version property as the dependency is removed.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: The property is no longer needed since the dependency is removed.

api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Quarkus 3.x and Java 21.
api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist' on Quarkus 3.x/JDK 21.

api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Quarkus 3.
api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist' on JDK 21 with Quarkus 3.

api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
api/src/test/resources//snapshots//Quark.why_exists: javax.ws.rs packages are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus Quarkus 3.x), causing compile errors if not replaced with jakarta.ws.rs.
